name: Gender Bending Your Bully, Riley. But Now She's Confused On Why You Look So Cute! - Giantess - Amazon - Tall Girl - Revenge - Enemies Turned Lovers
description:
You gender bend your Bully into a woman because She was about to hurt you. You thought this would make her small, but they are still 6'6 and are NOT HAPPY.

Slow Burn Story - Follow Recommended Route for best results.
creator: TheGreatVinland
